info.title: Ecommerce-buildTime
info.description: API for managing and interacting with the Ecommerce-buildTime platform, providing endpoints for product management, order processing, and user account operations.

tags.name: products
tags.description: Operations related to product management including listing, creation, update, and deletion.

tags.name: orders
tags.description: Endpoints for order processing, tracking, and management.

tags.name: users
tags.description: User account related operations such as registration, authentication, and profile management.

get.summary: Retrieve the shopping cart for a specific user
get.description: Fetches the current contents and status of the shopping cart belonging to the user identified by userId. Returns all items, quantities, and pricing details in the cart.

400.description: Invalid user ID supplied or malformed request.

example.message: The provided userId is invalid or missing.

details.issue: User ID must be a valid non-empty string

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add an item to the user's shopping cart
post.description: Adds a specified item and quantity to the shopping cart for the user identified by userId. The request body should contain the product details and quantity to be added. Returns updated cart details upon success.

requestBody.description: Item details to add to the cart

200.description: Item added successfully and cart updated.

400.description: Bad request due to invalid input parameters or payload.

example.message: Provided cart item data is invalid or incomplete.

details.issue: Product ID must be a valid string and quantity must be a positive integer

500.description: Internal server error encountered while adding item.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Place a new order for the user
post.description: Creates a new order for the user identified by userId based on their current cart contents. This operation finalizes the order for payment and shipping processing. Returns the order details upon success.

400.description: Invalid request parameters or user cart is empty.

example.message: The order request is invalid: cart might be empty or userId is invalid.

details.issue: User ID must be valid and cart must contain items to place an order

404.description: User or cart not found for order placement.

example.message: No user or cart found matching the provided userId.

details.issue: User with provided ID does not exist or has no cart

500.description: Unexpected server error while placing order.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve detailed information of a specific order
get.description: Fetches comprehensive details about an existing order identified by orderId. Provides order status, items ordered, payment info, and shipping details.

example.message: The specified orderId is malformed or invalid.

details.issue: Order ID must be a valid non-empty string

example.message: No order found with the specified orderId.

details.issue: No order matches the given ID

500.description: Internal server error while retrieving order.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Starts the payment process by submitting payment details. Accepts payment method, amount, and order reference in the request body. Returns payment confirmation details or errors.

requestBody.description: Payment request information including amount, method, and order reference

400.description: Bad request due to invalid payment inputs.

example.message: Payment initiation request contains invalid or missing fields.

402.description: Payment required - insufficient funds or declined payment.

example.message: Payment was declined due to insufficient funds or card restrictions.

500.description: Internal server error during payment initiation.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Endpoint for receiving asynchronous payment status updates from payment gateway providers. Processes payment confirmations, failures, or refunds. The request body contains webhook event details.

requestBody.description: Webhook payload describing the payment event

example.message: The received webhook payload is invalid or missing required fields.

details.issue: Event type is missing or unrecognized

402.description: Payment required error triggered by webhook event.

example.message: Payment requires additional action as indicated by webhook.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add a new product to the catalog
post.description: Creates a new product record in the product catalog. The request body must include product name, description, price, and inventory details. Returns the created product details.

requestBody.description: Details of the product to add

example.message: One or more product fields are invalid or missing.

details.issue: Price must be a positive number

409.description: Conflict due to product already existing.

example.message: A product with the same name or identifier already exists.

500.description: Internal server error while adding product.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Track the shipping status of an order
get.description: Returns the current shipping status and location of the order identified by orderId. Provides estimated delivery times and tracking history.

404.description: Order or tracking information not found.

example.message: No tracking information available for the specified orderId.

details.issue: Order ID not associated with any shipment or tracking info

500.description: Server error while retrieving shipping tracking information.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Creates a new user account with the provided registration details. The request body must include user information such as name, email, and password. Returns the created user profile upon success.

example.message: One or more user registration fields are invalid or missing.

409.description: User already exists with the same email or username.

example.message: A user with the given email or username already exists.

500.description: Internal server error during user registration.

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

currency.description: Currency code for the item's price, e.g., USD, EUR.

discount.description: Discount applied to the item price.

finalPrice.description: Final price of the item after applying discount.

price.description: Original price of the item before discount.

quantity.description: Quantity of the product in the cart.

currency.description: Currency code used for the cart totals.

items.description: List of items currently in the shopping cart.

payableAmount.description: Total amount to be paid after discounts.

totalAmount.description: Sum of original prices of all items before discounts.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied to the cart.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of when the cart was last updated, in ISO 8601 format.

userId.description: Identifier of the user who owns the cart.

discount.description: Discount applied to the order item.

finalPrice.description: Final price of the item after discount applied for the order.

price.description: Original price of the product before discount.

productId.description: Unique identifier of the product ordered.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order was created, in ISO 8601 format.

items.description: List of items included in the order.

payableAmount.description: Total amount to be paid for the order after discounts.

paymentStatus.description: Current payment status of the order (e.g., pending, completed).

status.description: Current overall status of the order (e.g., processing, shipped).

totalDiscount.description: Total discounts applied on the order.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the order was last updated, ISO 8601 format.

userId.description: Identifier for the user who placed the order.

amount.description: Amount to be paid for the order.

orderId.description: Identifier of the order for which payment is made.

paymentGateway.description: Name of the payment gateway used (e.g., Stripe, PayPal).

paymentMethod.description: Payment method chosen by the user (e.g., credit card, PayPal).

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the payment was created, ISO 8601 format.

currency.description: Currency code used for the payment.

orderId.description: Identifier of the order associated with the payment.

paymentId.description: Unique identifier for the payment transaction.

paymentMethod.description: Method used to make the payment.

status.description: Status of the payment (e.g., successful, failed).

gatewayResponse.description: Response message from the payment gateway.

paymentId.description: Identifier of the payment in the gateway system.

status.description: Payment status received from the webhook (e.g., completed, failed).

transactionId.description: Transaction identifier associated with the payment gateway.

available.description: Indicates if the product is currently available for sale.

category.description: Category to which the product belongs.

currency.description: Currency code in which the product price is listed.

description.example: A wireless mouse with ergonomic design and long battery life.

rating.description: Average customer rating for the product.

stock.description: Number of units available in stock.

available.description: Indicates if the product is currently available for purchase

category.description: Category to which the product belongs

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the product was created

currency.description: Currency code for the product price

description.example: A high-quality electronic gadget with multiple features.

price.description: Price of the product in the specified currency

rating.description: Average customer rating of the product

stock.description: Available stock quantity for the product

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the product was last updated

courierPartner.description: Name of the courier or delivery partner handling the shipment

estimatedDelivery.description: Estimated delivery date and time for the package

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp of the latest tracking update

orderId.description: Identifier for the order being tracked

trackingId.description: Unique tracking number assigned to the shipment

active.description: Indicates whether the user account is active

country.description: Country of residence for the user

phone.description: Phone number of the user including country code

userType.description: Type of user account (e.g., admin, customer)

active.description: Indicates whether the user account is currently active

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created

phone.description: User's phone number with country code

preferredCurrency.description: Currency preferred by the user for transactions

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the user account

userId.description: Unique identifier assigned to the user

userType.description: Category or role of the user

status.description: HTTP status code of the error

timestamp.description: Date and time when the error occurred

path.description: Request path that caused the error

errorCode.description: Specific error code for more precise error identification

details.description: List of specific issues with fields in the request

field.description: Name of the field with an issue

status.description: HTTP status code of the error

timestamp.description: Date and time when the error occurred
